ddls:
CREATE TABLE "films" (
  "film_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each film */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the film */,
  "released" INTEGER /* Year the film was released */,
  "votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes received */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the film */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the film based on ratings */,
  "director" TEXT /* Director of the film */,
  "writer" TEXT /* Writer(s) of the film */,
  "cast" TEXT /* Main cast members */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Runtime of the film in minutes */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language of the film */,
  "poster_url" TEXT /* URL of the film's poster */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL of the film's trailer */,
  "synopsis" TEXT /* Brief synopsis of the film */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, reviewer, user) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "last_activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last activity */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text content of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given in the review */,
  "is_approved" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the review has been approved by an admin */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the review has been deleted */,
  "edit_date" TEXT /* Date the review was last edited */,
  "edit_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last edited the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre (e.g., Drama, Action) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_genres" (
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  "primary_genre" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the genre is the primary genre for the film */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("film_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "votes" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film being voted on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who cast the vote */,
  "vote_value" REAL /* Value of the vote */,
  "vote_date" TEXT /* Date the vote was cast */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the vote has been deleted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_followers" (
  "follower_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who follows another user */,
  "following_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being followed */,
  "follow_date" TEXT /* Date the user started following another user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("follower_id", "following_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was created */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the notification has been read by the user */,
  "read_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each view event */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film being viewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user viewing the film */,
  "view_date" TEXT /* Date when the film was viewed */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to view the film (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_film_views_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_film_views_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film being updated */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date of the update */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the update */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made */,
  "is_rolled_back" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the update has been rolled back */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_film_updates_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_film_updates_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_ratings" (
  "user_rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user rating entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who rated the film */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film being rated */,
  "rating_value" REAL /* Value of the rating given by the user */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was given */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the rating has been deleted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_ratings_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_audiences" (
  "audience_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audience entry */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the audience */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the audience */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Number of views by this demographic */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range in a structured format (e.g., 18-24, 25-34) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the audience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audience_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_film_audiences_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_directors" (
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film */,
  "director_id" INTEGER /* ID of the director */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("film_id", "director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_writers" (
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film */,
  "writer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the writer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("film_id", "writer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_cast" (
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film */,
  "cast_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cast member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("film_id", "cast_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used during the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_certifications" (
  "certification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each certification entry */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film */,
  "certification" TEXT /* Certification (e.g., PG-13, R) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the certification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("certification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_film_certifications_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award entry */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "award_year" INTEGER /* Year the award was won */,
  "award_category" TEXT /* Category of the award */,
  "award_description" TEXT /* Description of the award */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_film_awards_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)
